T0071.title: Stock Investor Data
T0071.definition: Investor data refers to personal information specifically tailored for targeting stock investors, traded in illicit data markets.
T0071.description: This data precisely targets high-net-worth or active retail investors and contains sensitive information such as investment preferences and portfolio holdings. Fraud rings use this data to carry out stock recommendation scams, pump-and-dump schemes, and other illegal activities, with single fraud amounts often being substantial. Due to its high conversion rate and strong monetization potential, investor data is a high-value commodity in darknet trading.
